description: Normative JSON Schema for DEAL Simulation Protocol v0 input.json. Every simulation input artifact MUST validate against this schema. See spec/sims/v0/README.md for the human-readable reference.

deal_sim_protocol.description: Protocol version tag. Always 'v0' for artifacts conforming to this schema.

inputs.description: Map from input parameter name to value+unit pair. Keys MUST be alphabetically sorted (D-18).

model_path.description: Workspace-relative path to the DEAL model file that produced these inputs (D-70).

v.description: Document format version. Always 1 for DEAL Simulation Protocol v0.

title: DEAL Simulation Protocol v0 — input.json

InputValue.description: A single simulation input value with optional unit annotation.

unit.description: Optional unit string (e.g. 'kg', 'V', 'ohm'). Advisory for external tools; enforced by Zig dimensional checker for Zig-internal sims.

value.description: The resolved scalar value for this input parameter.

InputValue.title: InputValue
